title: Sumerian/Akkadian: The Death of Gilgamesh
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Death of Gilgamesh.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Death of Gilgamesh.

translation.text: From 'The Death of Gilgamesh': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
